case_title: NESTOR DANIEL PENNINO VS. MARIA ELENA WANG-HORN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NESTOR PENNINO RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENNINO, NESTOR DANIEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-04-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $130.00 SERVED FEB-07-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WANG-HORN, MARIA ELENA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PENNINO, NESTOR DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT WANG-HORN, MARIA ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENNINO, NESTOR DANIEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WANG-HORN, MARIA ELENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 03/08/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF NESTOR PENNINO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE #292302. DEFENDANT MARIA WANG-HORN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
